memberdef.type: std::function< void(std::string_view text, bool isDelta, bool isFinal)>
memberdef.definition: using Tryll::Client::AgentProxy::AnswerTextCallback = std::function<void(std::string_view text, bool isDelta, bool isFinal)>
memberdef.name: AnswerTextCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback type for streaming text chunks.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread for each AnswerText frame received from the server (including frames from server-initiated turns such as voice autosend). Must return quickly and must not call any blocking TryllClient or AgentProxy methods.

Parameters:
text — streamed text chunk.
isDelta — true when text is an incremental token/chunk; false when it is the accumulated response so far.
isFinal — true for the last chunk before TurnComplete.

memberdef.type: std::function< void(::Tryll::TurnStatus status, std::string_view debugInfoJson, std::int32_t tokensGenerated)>
memberdef.definition: using Tryll::Client::AgentProxy::TurnCompleteCallback = std::function<void(::Tryll::TurnStatus status, std::string_view debugInfoJson, std::int32_t tokensGenerated)>
memberdef.name: TurnCompleteCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback type for turn-complete notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread once per turn, immediately after TurnComplete arrives. Covers both client-initiated turns (via SendText) and server-initiated turns (voice autosend).

Parameters:
status — turn outcome (::Tryll::TurnStatus).
debugInfoJson — JSON diagnostics string; non-empty only when the agent was created with enableDiagnostics=true.
tokensGenerated — total tokens sampled across all generation nodes.
Must return quickly and must not call any blocking methods.

briefdescription.para: Callback type for agent-level error notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread when a SendText turn is terminated by a server-reported ErrorResponse, or when the connection drops mid-turn. Must return quickly and must not call any blocking methods.

parameterdescription.para: The error reported by the server or transport layer.

briefdescription.para: Callback type for tool-call notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread for each NodeEvent with event_type="tool_call" received from the server (i.e. when the agent's graph has a ToolCall node with notify_client="true").

Parameters:
toolName — the tool the model asked to call.
argumentsJson — compact JSON object of arguments, e.g. {"city":"Berlin"}.
Must return quickly and must not call any blocking methods.

memberdef.type: std::function< void(std::string_view intent, std::string_view recordId, std::size_t recordIndex, float distance)>
memberdef.definition: using Tryll::Client::AgentProxy::IntentClassifiedCallback = std::function<void(std::string_view intent, std::string_view recordId, std::size_t recordIndex, float distance)>
memberdef.name: IntentClassifiedCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback type for intent-classification notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread for each NodeEvent with event_type="intent_classified" — fired by ClassifyIntentNode on its "found" path when notify_client="true".

Parameters:
intent — the classified intent label.
recordId — id of the top-1 matched KB record.
recordIndex — 0-based index of the matched record in storage.
distance — cosine distance of the match.
Must return quickly and must not call any blocking methods.

briefdescription.para: One ordered key/value pair in a NodeEvent payload.

memberdef.type: std::function< void(std::string_view nodeName, std::string_view eventType, const std::vector< NodeEventKeyValue > &kvPairs)>
memberdef.definition: using Tryll::Client::AgentProxy::NodeEventCallback = std::function<void(std::string_view nodeName, std::string_view eventType, const std::vector<NodeEventKeyValue>& kvPairs)>
memberdef.name: NodeEventCallback

briefdescription.para: Generic NodeEvent callback.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked on the reader thread when a NodeEvent arrives whose event_type is unrecognised or whose typed callback is not set. If a typed callback (e.g. ToolCallCallback, IntentClassifiedCallback) is registered for the incoming event_type, this callback is NOT fired for that event.

Parameters:
nodeName — name of the emitting workflow node.
eventType — event discriminator.
kvPairs — ordered string→string payload.

memberdef.type: std::function< void(uint32_t sampleRate, uint16_t channels, uint16_t bitsPerSample)>
memberdef.definition: using Tryll::Client::AgentProxy::TtsAudioFormatCallback = std::function<void(uint32_t sampleRate, uint16_t channels, uint16_t bitsPerSample)>
memberdef.name: TtsAudioFormatCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback type for the TTS audio format announcement.

detaileddescription.para: Fired once per GenerateAndSpeak turn, before the first TtsAudioFrame.

Parameters:
sampleRate — PCM sample rate (e.g. 22050).
channels — channel count (always 1 for current models).
bitsPerSample — bit depth (always 16).

briefdescription.para: Callback type for streaming TTS PCM chunks.

detaileddescription.para: Fired for each int16 LE PCM chunk synthesized by a GenerateAndSpeak node. End-of-stream is signalled by the existing turn-complete future returned from SendMessage — there is no per-chunk final flag.
Must return quickly and must not call any blocking methods.

briefdescription.para: Send a text message to the agent (fire-and-forget).

detaileddescription.para: Enqueues the message and returns immediately. The response arrives through the persistent callbacks registered via SetOnAnswerText, SetOnTurnComplete, and SetOnError. Register those callbacks before the first SendText call.

briefdescription.para: Apply typed node parameters to a named workflow node asynchronously.

detaileddescription.para: The supplied params must match the concrete type of the target node (type mismatch → InvalidParamValue 3007 from the server). The mutation diff-loop on the server vetoes structural fields and invokes OnXxxChanged callbacks for fields that have changed.

The C++ client does not cache a baseline copy of authored params: callers must own the typed params they last sent (or authored at CreateAgent) and start each mutation from that local copy. Structural fields must match the create-time values or the server returns ParamNotMutable.

parameterdescription.para: Instance name of the target node (as declared in the graph).
Whole authored typed params for the node.

simplesect.para: Future completing on Ack. Throws TryllError on server-reported errors (UnknownNode 3005, ParamNotMutable 3006, InvalidParamValue 3007, or AgentBusy 3004).

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over ChangeParamsAsync.
Register a callback for streaming text chunks.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default- constructed) AnswerTextCallback to unregister.
Fires on the reader thread for every AnswerText frame, including frames from server-initiated turns (e.g. voice autosend).

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with (text, isDelta, isFinal), or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback for turn-complete notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default- constructed) TurnCompleteCallback to unregister.
Fires on the reader thread once per TurnComplete frame, for both client-initiated and server-initiated turns.

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with (status, debugInfoJson, tokensGenerated), or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback for agent-level error notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default- constructed) ErrorCallback to unregister.
Fires on the reader thread when a SendText turn is terminated by a server-reported error or a connection drop. Does not fire for ::Tryll::TurnStatus_Error turns (those arrive via SetOnTurnComplete).

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with the TryllError, or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback for tool-call notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default- constructed) ToolCallCallback to unregister.
Fires on the reader thread for every NodeEvent with event_type="tool_call" the server sends for this agent.

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with (toolName, argumentsJson), or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback for intent-classification notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default- constructed) IntentClassifiedCallback to unregister.
Fires on the reader thread for every NodeEvent with event_type="intent_classified" the server sends for this agent (emitted by ClassifyIntentNode when notify_client="true").

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with (intent, recordId, recordIndex, distance), or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register a generic NodeEvent fallback callback.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces any previously set callback. Pass an empty (default-constructed) NodeEventCallback to unregister.

Fires on the reader thread for every NodeEvent whose event_type is either unrecognised or has no typed callback registered. When a typed callback handles the event, this one is NOT invoked for the same event.

parameterdescription.para: Callable invoked with (nodeName, eventType, kvPairs), or empty to clear.

briefdescription.para: Register (or clear) the TTS audio format callback.
Register (or clear) the TTS audio chunk callback.
Request agent destruction on the server asynchronously.

detaileddescription.para: All registered callbacks are cleared before the destroy request is sent. The proxy becomes inert once the returned future completes; further SendText calls are no-ops.

simplesect.para: Future completing when the server acknowledges destruction.

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over DestroyAsync.

parameterdescription.para: On server-reported errors, disconnect, or timeout (configured by the owning client).

briefdescription.para: Server-assigned agent identifier.

simplesect.para: The agent_id field from the original CreateAgentResponse.

briefdescription.para: Client-side handle for one server-side agent.

detaileddescription.para: Obtained from TryllClient::CreateAgent. The proxy is copyable — all copies share the same underlying agent binding. The server-side agent is destroyed when Destroy is called explicitly.
